feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HANA SQL QUERY TO FETCH NESTED JSON OBJECTS
entry.content:
hi ,

I have a table machine_group with values as shown.

 

Now using a query as show below

select * from machine_group for json

the values fetched as below 

[
  {"COLA" :"A","COLB":"VAL1"},{"COLA" :"A","COLB":"VAL2"},{"COLA" :"A","COLB":"VAL3"},
  {"COLA" :"B","COLB":"VAL5"},{"COLA" :"B","COLB":"VAL6"},{"COLA" :"B","COLB":"VAL7"}
 ]

But am looking to fetch the output in nested json format as shown below.

 
[
{
"COLA":"A",
"COLB":[ {"COLB":"VAL1"}, {"COLB":"VAL2"}, {"COLB":"VAL3"}]
},
{
"COLA":"B",
"COLB":[ {"COLB":"VAL4"}, {"COLB":"VAL5"}, {"COLB":"VAL6"}]
}
]

 

Please help me. 

Regards

Govardan

entry.title: I am getting problem Value is not applied during RFQ creation
entry.content:
During RFQ creation 

When I try to put Supplier address 

Then its shows Value is not applied.

Message No. DH864

entry.title: How to terminate transaction causing high CPU Utilization in SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is there any way to terminate/cancel the transaction causing 100% CPU for more than 5-10 min?

Is it possible to apply any specific condition on the HANA database layer/ application layer?

Or is there any other way to achieve this?

Please let me know!

Thanks,
Shruti

entry.title: UB document that does not record consumption
entry.content: We use UB purchase orders to move items from hubs to spokes. When those go materials go to other plants that are not designated replenishment paths, we want SAP to ignore the consumption all together in the corrected total, not just record it in unplanned consumption. We are overbuying due to operational issues and need to see if a customized version of UB purchase orders can ignore all consumption records for forecasting in the plant that sent the material. Is there a way to do this, and would the Consumption field KZVBR in EKPO be the field or setting that drives that?

entry.title: Does SAP HANA graph have gremlin query support? If yes , is there any documentation for the same?
entry.content:
I am evaluating various options for querying graph data in sap hana db.  Although SAP HANA supports Cypher query, is there a support for connection and data fetch using gremlin.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Canada tax procedure
entry.content:
Hi, 

There is a requirement where company code for europe and Canada would be same. And company code belongs to UAE for tax saving purpose.

Now the issue is if company code belongs to UAE then conditions type of tax for Canada like JRC1 JRC2 ect is not getting triggered because system can't read TAXCAJ ( with Jurisdiction code) tax procedure where Tax condition type got assigned, also these conditions are maintained in FTXP with tax code and also  conditions record will get upated in FV11.

These conditions type should work for different company code , so to achieve this could you please help me to get solution?

entry.title: How to defragment column store table in SAP HANA database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How can we perform defragmentation of the column store table?

Need to reorganize the space.

Please let me know, thanks in advance.

Regards,

Shruti

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Sales
entry.content:
i have one issue can anybody help me for this please suggest the genuine reason? #SAP SD

combine of material and color coding-user may choose manually same material with color in pop up screen. and quantity ratio- suppose customer buy 10 main material we can give offer if customer buy 2 more then only discount will applicable.

#SAP

entry.title: SAP Hana Express licence with more than 32GB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

can it be that there are no more SAP Hana Express licences if the memory is more than 32GB? Some time ago you could buy them in the SAP Store. What is the future of SAP Hana Express?

Because the free tier environment for individuels is being discontinued, I thought I would revive the local Hana. But that gives me a bad feeling.

entry.title: S4 identification(BUT0ID ) is getting deleted during C4C replication.
entry.content:
Dear Team, 

we have one identification type in S4 for which there is no mapping defined from C4C. so this identification type never replicated to C4C. for the same customer, if i go to c4c and change any attribute ( like first name, last name), then that replication message from C4C, deleting the identification type in S4. 
how to prevent this deletion? we need this identification in S4 but not in C4C. however any change in C4C is deleting the same from S4. Can you please help?

entry.title: Row table memory leak on Hana 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

When checking the database with minicheck, I found that there is a warning in M0426 (Row store table leak size), I use sql Hana_Memory_TopConsumers to check the memory situation,it shows that there is 208GB of garbage collection fragments in my system (Ext.Frag.Garb.)
Check note 1999993, mention note 2362759 2169283, where 2362759 does not match my system (the system version does not match and the result of step 6 is different),
Note 2169283 I don't know how to use it, how do I need to check further to confirm the cause?

 

Minicheck result

CHIDDESCRIPTIONHOSTVALUEEXPECTED_VALUECSAP_NOTE
M0423Heap areas with potential memory leak nonenone 1999997
M0425Pool/RowEngine/CpbTree leak size (GB) 0.08<= 20.00 1999997
M0426Row store table leak size (GB) 208.11<= 20.00X2362759

 

TopConsumers

HOSTPORTAREASUBAREADETAILCOUNTGAL_GBSIZE_GBSIZE_PCT
any  anyCOLUMNColumn Store (Main)any1244641933.59762.1639.41
any  anyROWRow Store (Ext. Frag. Garb.)any11933.59208.110.76
any  anyHEAPHeap (System)any12091933.5940.372.08

entry.title: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277
entry.content: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277

entry.title: what report gives the lots in QI inspection including the receiving date?
entry.content: Is there any report that list the material  lots in QI and include the receiving date ?

entry.title: The YELLOW exclamation point in the projection of SAP HANA Graphical Calculation View.
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Drop table into the projection of SAP HANA Graphical Calculation View, all field are displayed with yellow exclamation point as below :

What those exclamation point means? How to remove them ?

Tks.

entry.title: How can I extend/increase the period of HANA load history?
entry.content:
By default, HANA load history is saved for approximately 12 days. How can I extend or increase the period of HANA load history?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP DBTech JDBC: [403]: internal error: Cannot get remote source objects:
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

While connecting the remote source system, S4_HANA_SDA connect timeout expired error occur. 

Here is the error details.

 Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP HANA Tenant DB tables connection with another Tenant
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a scenario where we are consuming the DB tables from one tenant to another in Calculation Views and Table Functions. Below is an example where the other Tenant (BD1) DB table is consumed.

When moving these CV's to quality, it should auto assign this to 'BQ1'. Can you please suggest, how this can be achieved?

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

SAP HANA

entry.title: SAP Standard Kafka Integration Options
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a SAP Standard integration betweeen Kafka and R3/HANA to replace HANA Streaming Analytics.

We need to replace  HANA Streaming Analytics because it is going out of support (cant find the note at the moment) and somehow even more important the installtion guide for the kafka adapters wants extremely old kafka-client jar files as well some some avro jars that have CVEs and do not have any updates.

Our existing R3/Oracle uses PO and a 3rd party adapter for Kafka but the performance is not great so we were hoping for a much better solution.

We are onpremise on RHEL.

Any pointers would be appreciated.

regards

Angelo

entry.title: What are the limitations to the number of columns a vertex/edge table can have for sap hana graph ?
entry.content:
Is there any limitation as to what number of columns can be added in a table in sap hana db . I intend to use the table to create a graph workspace. Since sap hana mainly uses homogenous graphs with single label , hence I plan to add all my columns in a single table. 

Hence is there any upper limit as to what number of columns will sap hana support ?

Kindly advice.
